basic_details.job_title: Annamalai University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Annamalai University has officially announced the Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The recruitment notification has been released for eligible candidates with a qualification of M.Sc. in Genetics and Plant Breeding. Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can submit their applications through Email mode on or before 12 July 2026. Direct links to download the notification and application details are shared below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Genetics and Plant Breeding
qualification.details: M.Sc. in Genetics and Plant Breeding

selection_process: Short-listed candidates will be called for interview. Candidates should appear for interview along with their original certificates and other relevant documents. The selection will be based on qualification
experience and performance in the interview.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Annamalai University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 12-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Annamalai University Project Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Annamalai University Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Annamalai University Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

Annamalai University Project Assistant Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Short-listed candidates will be called for interview. Candidates should appear for interview along with their original certificates and other relevant documents. The selection will be based on qualification, experience and performance in the interview.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Annamalai University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 12-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Annamalai University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Assistant position at Annamalai University?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Project Assistant post is 12th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Project Assistant position, candidates must possess an M.Sc. degree in Genetics and Plant Breeding from a recognized university or institution.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Assistant role will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000/- per month. This is a project-based position.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications should be submitted via email. You need to send your application along with a detailed resume to the specified email address before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the information available, there is no application fee mentioned for this recruitment drive for the Project Assistant position at Annamalai University.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Annamalai University is recruiting for a total of 1 vacancy for the Project Assistant position.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their qualifications and experience, followed by an interview. The final selection will be based on performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is Annamalai University located?
faq.answer: Annamalai University is located in Chidambaram, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 608002.

faq.question: Q9. What is the nature of this job?
faq.answer: This is a project-based job. The duration for the Project Assistant position is mentioned as 36 months in the salary details.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I include with my application?
faq.answer: You should include a detailed resume and self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
